text:
40.1.2.14 - Student Nurse Visits 
(Rev. 179, Issued: 01-14-14, Effective: 01-07-14, Implementation: 01-07-14) 
A3-3118.1.B.14, HHA-205.1.B.14 

Visits made by a student nurse may be covered as skilled nursing care when the HHA 
participates in training programs that utilize student nurses enrolled in a school of nursing 
to perform skilled nursing services in a home setting. To be covered, the services must 
be reasonable and necessary skilled nursing care and must be performed under the
